subcodes.first_line: The Book of God hath been sent down in truth, and verily it is a glorious Book which God, the Lord of the worlds, hath revealed. Indeed, it beareth glad tidings unto the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الله نزل بالحق و انه لکتاب کریم انزله الله رب العالمین انه یبشر العالم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
